title: Incorrectly formatted output for the ".fullschema" command in the CLI
description:
drh added on 2018-05-08 23:15:55:
The ".fullschema" command in the CLI incorrectly formats the STAT1 and STAT4
data.  Bisecting shows that this problem originated in check-in
[72e8f529ac8a268611f16456]
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_schema (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, value REAL DEFAULT 0.0, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_schema (name, value) VALUES ('Test2', NULL);
SELECT id, name, value, created_at FROM test_schema WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
